item.title: MrBeast's company fired video editor after Kalshi accused employee of insider trading
item.description: A MrBeast video editor has been fired after accusations of insider trading by Kalshi

item.title: More than 20 states sue over new Trump global tariffs after Supreme Court loss
item.description: Some two dozen states are challenging President Donald Trump’s new global tariffs in court

item.title: Morgan Stanley to lay off about 3% of its workforce as job cuts continue in financial sector
item.description: Morgan Stanley is cutting about 2,500 jobs in a broad round of layoffs across most of the firm

item.title: Average US long-term mortgage rate ticks up to 6%, ending a three-week slide
item.description: The average long-term U.S. mortgage rate came off its lowest level in three and a half years this week, as bond yields marched higher following a spik...

item.title: Cologne Cathedral, one of Germany's best-known landmarks, to charge tourists for admission
item.description: Cologne Cathedral, a famous German landmark and popular tourist draw, will start charging an admission fee to visitors as church officials struggle wi...
